text: Added JVM-only gale.sparse.direct provider contract with capability-less default; explicit given selection; separate provider workspace, symbolic analysis, numeric factor, vector/matrix solveInto, and immutable diagnostics; exact-pattern/provider/lifecycle validation; owned ordering and pivot permutations; thread and close semantics. Added deterministic LU test provider covering changing values on one analysis, normal/transpose/multi-RHS and destination solves, wrong patterns/workspaces, unsupported capabilities, malformed handle ownership, independent factor lifetime, and concurrent solves with distinct workspaces. Full core verification: 500 JVM tests and 491 Scala.js tests pass; JS remains unaffected. docs/sparse-direct-provider.md records an explicit current no-go and packaging, conformance, reuse, resource, threading, performance, and distribution gates for any future SuiteSparse, faer-inspired, or pure provider. No sparse direct capability is advertised or routed.
